tasks.title: Fix Flaky Test `test_theme_config_resolve_path_tilde_expansion`
tasks.description: `dirs::home_dir()` doesn't respect `HOME` env var on macOS, causing the test `test_theme_config_resolve_path_tilde_expansion` to fail. Replace with `dirs_next::home_dir()` or add proper mocking for the HOME env var.
test_criteria: Test `test_theme_config_resolve_path_tilde_expansion` passes on macOS
Test `test_theme_config_resolve_path_tilde_expansion` passes on Linux
`dirs_next::home_dir()` is used instead of `dirs::home_dir()` OR HOME env var is properly mocked in tests
No regression in other config tests
tasks.impl_notes: Find the test in crates/core/src/config.rs or adjacent test files. Replace `dirs::home_dir()` with `dirs_next::home_dir()` (add `dirs_next` to Cargo.toml if needed) or use `std::env::var("HOME")` fallback with proper env mocking in tests.

tasks.title: Plan Deprecated Fields Removal (P1-3)
tasks.description: Deprecated fields `mode`, `tools`, `theme`, and `keybinds` are still present in config. Document their current usage, add deprecation warnings, create a migration guide for v4.0, and plan the removal timeline.
test_criteria: All deprecated fields (`mode`, `tools`, `theme`, `keybinds`) have deprecation warnings emitted at runtime
Migration guide document exists for v4.0
Deprecation warnings are tested
No deprecated fields cause compilation errors (warnings only)
tasks.impl_notes: Affected files: `crates/config/src/config.rs`, `crates/core/src/config.rs`, `crates/cli/src/command.rs`. Use `#[deprecated]` attribute or manual `eprintln!` / `tracing::warn!` for runtime deprecation warnings. Timeline target is v4.0 removal.

tasks.title: Resolve Remaining Clippy Warnings (P2-16)
tasks.description: Some clippy warnings remain in the codebase (not errors, so they do not block release). Identify, categorize, and fix warnings where feasible within release scope.
test_criteria: `cargo clippy --all -- -W clippy::all` produces zero or documented/suppressed warnings
All remaining warnings are either fixed or explicitly `#[allow(...)]`-annotated with a comment explaining why
tasks.impl_notes: Deferred — does not block release. Fix only if time permits. Categorize by severity before acting.

tasks.title: Complete Per-Crate Test Backlog (P2-17)
tasks.description: Per-crate test coverage is incomplete. Review coverage per crate, identify missing test cases from the backlog (FR-026, FR-027), add edge case tests, and ensure mock helpers are properly used.
test_criteria: Each crate has measurable test coverage for its public API
Edge cases identified in FR-026 and FR-027 are covered by tests
Mock helpers from `tests/src/common/` are used where appropriate
`cargo test --all` passes without failures
tasks.impl_notes: Ongoing effort. Reference test helpers: `TempProject`, `MockServer`, `MockLLMProvider` in `tests/src/common/`. Prioritize crates with zero or near-zero coverage.

tasks.title: Remove Magic Numbers in Compaction (TD-007)
tasks.description: Magic numbers exist in the compaction logic in the `core` crate. Extract them to named configuration constants and add to the config schema if appropriate.
test_criteria: No raw numeric literals remain in compaction logic (or are justified with comments)
Extracted constants are named and documented
Constants are accessible via config schema if user-configurable
Existing compaction tests still pass
tasks.impl_notes: Deferred. Search for magic numbers with `rg '[0-9]\{3,\}' crates/core/src/` to locate candidates. Use `const` or config fields.

tasks.title: Evaluate Custom JSONC Parser (TD-008)
tasks.description: The codebase uses a custom JSONC parser. Evaluate replacing it with an existing crate such as `json_comments`. Research performance, maintenance, and migration cost.
test_criteria: Research findings documented (crates evaluated, pros/cons)
Performance benchmark comparison exists if migration is recommended
Migration plan created if switching is beneficial
All existing JSONC parsing tests pass after any migration
tasks.impl_notes: Deferred. Consider crates: `json_comments`, `jsonc-parser`, `serde_json_lenient`. Evaluate `json_comments` first as mentioned in the task.

tasks.title: Remove Deprecated `tools` Field (TD-004)
tasks.description: The `tools` config field is deprecated and should be migrated to the `permission` field. Ensure all usages are migrated, add a deprecation warning if not present, and schedule removal for v4.0.
test_criteria: All code references to the deprecated `tools` field emit a deprecation warning
All internal usages have been migrated to use `permission` field instead
A test verifies the deprecation warning is triggered when `tools` field is used
Existing permission-related tests still pass
tasks.impl_notes: Deferred. Part of the broader deprecated fields cleanup (see T-002). Removal scheduled for v4.0.

tasks.title: Remove Deprecated `theme` Field (TD-005)
tasks.description: The `theme` config field has been moved to `tui.json`. Ensure the migration is complete, remove the field from `opencode.json` schema, and add a deprecation warning if it is still present.
test_criteria: All theme configuration reads from `tui.json` rather than the main config
`theme` field is removed from `opencode.json` schema
A deprecation warning is emitted if `theme` field is detected in old config
Existing theme-related tests still pass
tasks.impl_notes: Deferred. Part of the broader deprecated fields cleanup (see T-002). Removal scheduled for v4.0.

tasks.title: Remove Deprecated `keybinds` Field (TD-006)
tasks.description: The `keybinds` config field has been moved to `tui.json`. Ensure the migration is complete, remove the field from `opencode.json` schema, and add a deprecation warning if it is still present.
test_criteria: All keybind configuration reads from `tui.json` rather than the main config
`keybinds` field is removed from `opencode.json` schema
A deprecation warning is emitted if `keybinds` field is detected in old config
Existing keybind-related tests still pass
tasks.impl_notes: Deferred. Part of the broader deprecated fields cleanup (see T-002). Removal scheduled for v4.0.

tasks.title: Phase 6 - Release Qualification Completion
tasks.description: Complete Phase 6 (final phase) of release qualification. All P0 blockers are resolved and clippy passes. Remaining: fix flaky test (T-001), complete non-functional test baselines, and obtain final release sign-off. Current coverage ~80%.
test_criteria: All P0 blockers resolved (done)
`cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings` passes with zero errors (done)
All major PRD features implemented (done)
Flaky test T-001 fixed and passing
Non-functional test baselines (performance, memory) documented
Final release sign-off obtained from team
tasks.impl_notes: Umbrella release qualification task. Depends on T-001 being fixed before final sign-off. Non-functional baselines should cover startup time, memory usage under load, and response latency.
